title: VLAND Tail Lights for Mini Cooper R56 R57 R58 R59 2007-2013 Rear Lights Lamp Assembly With Sequential Indicator and Welcome Lights (Red)
features: 👉【Perfect Fitment】VLAND Rear lights compatible for Mini Cooper R56 R57 R58 R59 2007 - 2013. Note:2007-2010, please use the adapter cable and set the switch on the back to “O” to achieve the function of the reversing light.

👉【Lighting Modes】Running light: LED (red)(Will Breath 2 Times When The Lights on);Turn Function: LED (yellow); Brake light: LED (red);Reverse light: LED (white).Red mirror caps cause the reversing lights to shine in red
👉【Quality】Rear lights have Super Bright LED Chips; Durable Black ABS Housing & Clear PMMA Lens; water-proof IP67, Maintenance Free.
👉【PLUG-and-PLAY】Easy to install, Direct Replacement Original Position,same as original one to install with all required Harness,Professional installation is highly recommended.
👉【Package Included】One pair of R56 R57 R58 R59 Tail Lights,included driver side and passenger side(no bulbs needed); All needed wires and resistors; 1 user manual.
description: Product Description VLAND Full LED Rear Lights for Mini Cooper R56 R57 R58 R59 Tail Lights Why Choose Us? We are a Chinese manufacturer dedicated to car headlights and taillight modification from 1987. VLAND have decades of experience and are exported to around 30 countries all over the world. We are a high-tech enterprise integrating industry and trade. Note As these are imported products, dirt, injury and damage to the box may occur during transportation, but this does not affect the functions. Perform a lighting test before installation. Due to different vehicle inspection policies in different regions, if some lights do not pass the vehicle inspection, please use lights as well. FEATURES Compatible For The Following Vehicles： LED Tail lights compatible for Mini Cooper R56 R57 R58 R59 2007 -2013 Waterproof: IP67. Shade colour: Red, Light Tea, Clear Housing Material: ABS plastic. Lens Material: PC. Mini Cooper 2007-2010, please use the adapter cable and set the switch on the back to “O” to achieve the function of the reversing light. 1. Red mirror cover will cause the reverse light is red light. 2. All colors mirror cover steering are yellow steering. Package Includes: One pair of left and right tail Lights (R56 R57 R58 R59) Instruction booklet x 1 Adapter cable x 2 Hot Tips: Please read the complete description and assembly before ordering the product Check your vehicle type and buy the right lights for your car Bolt-On OE fitment: It has the same connections and wires as the original cars, a replacement for the stock unit directly. Designed to provide trouble-free installation, install easily. Before&After Update the appearance of your vehicle by improving your visibility; Driving at night attracts people's attention. Better lighting effect, wider range, safer driving. Waterproof Adopts self-adhesive seal, seals for life. Good heat and moisture dissipation, lifespan up to 50000 hours.
